RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT MARCOS RIOS and AMERIQUEST MORTGAGE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED; However, that portion which imposes a 1 year statute of limitation and which imposes venue in Orange County are severed and deleted.
